# Professional Piano Performance — Requirements Traceability

> 需求真源：`docs/piano-performance-quality.md`
>
> 基线：1254 行；SHA-256 `7801e321bbc9ec976fa9c646b1dcfca253cf910967ddf6fc883385a8ae188fa6`。
>
> 本表记录计划所有权，不记录实时执行状态。执行状态只以 `todo.toml` 为准；最终证据状态由 `P15-T17` 收口。

- 审查编号：**54**
- 唯一 primary owner：**54/54**
- 计划阶段：**15**
- 原子任务：**158**

## 追踪规则

- 每个审查编号必须且只能有一个 primary owner task。
- supporting task 可以有多个，但不能替代 primary owner 的验收责任。
- `planned evidence` 只表示计划中的验证入口；没有实际运行，不得标记为通过。
- task 替换旧实现时，必须在同一 task 删除旧 API、旧状态、旧测试入口与双轨分支。

## Requirement Map

| Requirement | 审查结论 | 严重度 / 证据 | Primary owner | Supporting tasks | Planned evidence | 主要代码 / 文档落点 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ARCH-001`<br>[source L148](../../../docs/piano-performance-quality.md) | 缺少唯一的谱面与演奏真源 | 严重度：P0｜证据：代码确认 | [`P5-T1`](plan-p5.md#p5-t1) | — | `HappyPianistAVPTests/Practice/PreparedPracticeLifecycleTests.swift` | `HappyPianistAVP/Models/Practice/ScorePerformancePlan.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Models/Practice/PracticeModels.swift` |
| `ARCH-002`<br>[source L171](../../../docs/piano-performance-quality.md) | 输入能力、来源和置信度没有统一契约 | 严重度：P0｜证据：代码确认 | [`P8-T1`](plan-p8.md#p8-t1) | — | `HappyPianistAVPTests/Practice/PracticeSessionRecorderTests.swift` | `HappyPianistAVP/Models/Practice/PerformanceObservation.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Services/Practice/Session/PracticeSessionContracts.swift` |
| `ARCH-003`<br>[source L185](../../../docs/piano-performance-quality.md) | 产品模式共用同一个成功语义 | 严重度：P0｜证据：代码确认 | [`P11-T1`](plan-p11.md#p11-t1) | — | `HappyPianistAVPTests/Practice/PerformanceAssessmentTests.swift` | `HappyPianistAVP/Models/Practice/PerformanceAssessment.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/Practice/PerformanceAssessmentTests.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Models/Practice/PracticeModels.swift` |
| `SCORE-001`<br>[source L225](../../../docs/piano-performance-quality.md) | 数值 dynamics 的 MusicXML 语义错误 | 严重度：P0｜证据：规范确认 + 代码确认 | [`P2-T6`](plan-p2.md#p2-t6) | — | `HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserDynamicsTests.swift` | `HappyPianistAVP/Services/MusicXML/Parser/MusicXMLParserDelegate+Directions.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Services/MusicXML/Parser/MusicXMLParserDelegate+Notes.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserDynamicsTests.swift` |
| `SCORE-002`<br>[source L246](../../../docs/piano-performance-quality.md) | direction `<offset>` 没有一致移动全部方向事件 | 严重度：P0｜证据：代码确认，最终标准语义需 fixture 复核 | [`P2-T8`](plan-p2.md#p2-t8) | — | `HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserDynamicsTests.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserWedgeTests.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserWordsTests.swift` | `HappyPianistAVP/Services/MusicXML/Parser/MusicXMLParserDelegate+Directions.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Services/MusicXML/Parser/MusicXMLParserDelegate+Elements.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserDynamicsTests.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserWedgeTests.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserWordsTests.swift`<br>+1 more |
| `SCORE-003`<br>[source L260](../../../docs/piano-performance-quality.md) | 两 part “大谱表归一化”会丢事件并可能误合并乐器 | 严重度：P0｜证据：代码确认 | [`P3-T2`](plan-p3.md#p3-t2) | — | `HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLPianoGrandStaffNormalizerTests.swift` | `HappyPianistAVP/Services/MusicXML/MusicXMLPianoGrandStaffNormalizer.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Models/MusicXML/MusicXMLScore+PartFiltering.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLPianoGrandStaffNormalizerTests.swift` |
| `SCORE-004`<br>[source L284](../../../docs/piano-performance-quality.md) | 主 part 选择依赖 P1 或音符数量启发式 | 严重度：P1｜证据：代码确认 | [`P3-T3`](plan-p3.md#p3-t3) | — | `HappyPianistAVPTests/Practice/PracticeLaunchFailureTests.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserTests.swift` | `HappyPianistAVP/Services/MusicXML/MusicXMLPracticePartSelector.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Models/MusicXML/MusicXMLScore+PartFiltering.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Services/Practice/Session/PracticePreparationService.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserTests.swift` |

| `SCORE-006`<br>[source L315](../../../docs/piano-performance-quality.md) | 原始音名拼写和微分音信息被过早压缩为 MIDI note | 严重度：P1｜证据：代码确认 | [`P2-T3`](plan-p2.md#p2-t3) | — | `HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserTests.swift` | `HappyPianistAVP/Models/MusicXML/MusicXMLWrittenPitch.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Models/MusicXML/MusicXMLModels.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Services/MusicXML/Parser/MusicXMLParserDelegate+Notes.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVP/Services/MusicXML/Parser/MusicXMLParserDelegateState.swift`<br>`HappyPianistAVPTests/MusicXML/MusicXMLParserTests.swift` |

## Completion Status Contract

执行期间由 `P15-T14` 为每个 requirement 追加以下证据状态之一；不得在计划阶段预填通过：

- `resolved`：实现、自动化验证与要求的集成 / 人工证据均完成。
- `accepted limitation`：明确保留的边界，有可见 provenance、能力裁剪与文档说明。
- `blocked evidence`：实现可能完成，但缺少真机、钢琴家、授权语料或研究证据。
- `open`：尚未完成或审计发现未关闭。

最终 closeout 必须引用具体 commit、测试命令、run log、指标报告或人工协议结果；“代码看起来正确”不是完成证据。
